name: Miracle Rise Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Spray a 9-inch tube or Bundt pan with non-stick cooking spray.
2. In a large mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water. Let it sit for about 5 minutes until foamy.
3. Add egg substitute, milk, oil, and sweet (unsweetened) cocoa powder to the yeast mixture. Mix well at high speed.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, vanilla extract, and red food coloring. Mix on low speed until just combined.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan and cover with foil. Let rise in a warm place for 45 minutes.
6. Remove foil and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Invert cake onto a wire rack to cool completely.
1/12th of the finished cake contains approximately 145 calories.
Exchange values: 1/2 cup skim milk; 1 fruit serving; 1 fat serving
